validation.coverLetterTooLong: Cover letter must not exceed 1000 characters
validation.lastWorkTooLong: Last work must not exceed 255 characters
validation.experienceRange: Experience must be between 0 and 60 years
validation.whyJoinTooLong: This field must not exceed 2000 characters

validation.noticePeriodTooLong: Notice period must not exceed 100 characters
validation.salaryTooLong: Expected salary must not exceed 100 characters
validation.fileTooLarge: File size must be less than 5MB
validation.invalidFileType: File must be PDF, DOC, or DOCX
